title: MGN 520 (M) Amendment 2 human element guidance - the deadly dozen
body: "Notice to all ship owners, ship operators and managers, masters, officers and crew of merchant vessels, skippers and crew of domestic passenger ships and inland waterways vessels  This notice should be read with MGN 505, MGN 638, MGN 351, MGN 640 (M+F), the human element - a guide to human behaviour in the shipping industry, leading for safety and other maritime human element publications. "
